---
name: Feature / strategy proposal
about: Propose a feature or a strategy/risk change
title: "[proposal] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Problem**
What problem does this solve?

**Proposed change**
What you want to add or change.

**Evidence (for strategy/risk changes)**
How will this be validated? Strategy changes require backtest evidence before
merge — outline the experiment.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches and why this one.
